CVE-2011-3761.title: NuSOAP 0.9.5 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive informat ...
CVE-2011-3761.summary: NuSOAP 0.9.5 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via a direct request to a .php file, which reveals the installation path in an error message, as demonstrated by nuSOAP/classes/class.wsdl.php and certain other files.
